title: draba imbricatifolia var. suffruticosa
intro: Draba imbricatifolia var. suffruticosa, also known as Alpine Rockcress or Alpine Rockcress Suffruticosa, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Alpine Rockcress Suffruticosa is traditionally prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems are used in folk medicine for various purposes.
